summary: Comprehensive testing of Paris apartment valuation app with new features completed. All backend APIs (18/18) fully functional, frontend working with all 7 tabs and new features including document upload, market position, expert insights, and market listings.

ui_bugs.issue: Click timeout due to overlay interception in dropdown
ui_bugs.workaround: Dropdown functionality works, just needs force=True for automated testing

passed_tests: Landing page loads with hero and navigation
Multi-step form with 5 steps (Localisation, Bien, État, Immeuble, Juridique)
Address autocomplete via BAN API working
Form submission creates estimation and redirects to results
Results page shows 5 metrics: price (958,706€), price/m² (14,749€), confidence (95%), comparables (20), market position (+)
All 7 tabs working: Hypothèses, Marché, Expert, Estimation, Comparables, Risques, Documents
Hypothèses tab shows adjustment breakdown with detailed explanations and toggle functionality
Marché tab shows market position indicator (++/+/=/−/−−) with visual bar and comparison vs arrondissement (+11.7%)
Marché tab shows recent transactions list from DVF with stats
Expert tab shows expert insights: prix/pièce, charges copro, marge négociation, coût détention
Documents tab shows upload zone with category selector (9 categories available)
Document upload interface with file type restrictions (PDF, images, Excel - max 20Mo)
Estimation tab shows waterfall chart
Comparables tab shows Leaflet map with DVF transactions
Risques tab shows DPE display and risk list
Navigation buttons (share, simulator, back) all present and functional
Backend API: POST /api/valuation/estimate returns market_position in response
Backend API: GET /api/market/listings returns recent transactions
Backend API: POST /api/documents/upload accepts file upload
Backend API: GET /api/documents/{valuation_id} returns document list
Backend API: DELETE /api/documents/{file_id} works correctly
Backend API: All existing endpoints (address search, DVF search, geo risks, algorithm config, valuation CRUD, simulation)

success_percentage.frontend: 98% (all major functionality working, minor UI interaction issue only)
